.4s!important;overflow:hidden!important;width:100%!important;max-width:100%!important}\n.pharmacy-stack-card:hover{transform:translateY(-4px);box-shadow:var(\u002d\u002dshadow-strong)!important}\n.pharmacy-stack-card:before{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;border-radius:inherit;padding:1.5px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(14,116,144,.5),rgba(20,184,166,0),rgba(37,99,235,.4));-webkit-mask:linear-gradient(#fff
